title: New languages added
summary: Frames adds Czech, Slovak, Hungarian, Croatian, and Malay, extending language support and making the app feel more natural for users across the world.

sections.alt: Frames app now supports Czech on macOS

sections.content: Frames now supports Czech, Slovak, Hungarian, Croatian, and Malay on macOS, alongside the existing languages: English, Arabic, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, and Vietnamese.
This addition helps Frames feel closer to how people naturally work in different regions, so using the app is more familiar regardless of language.
Expanding language support is part of making Frames available to more users worldwide in a way that feels consistent across platforms.

improvements: Added Czech, Slovak, Hungarian, Croatian, and Malay localization
meta_description: Frames adds Czech, Slovak, Hungarian, Croatian, and Malay support on macOS, extending language availability across regions.
